The '''''Backstab''''', also known as the '''''Captain's Ladder''''', was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] that saw service with a group of [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] and [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]].

==History==
''Backstab'' was originally part of the [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] of the [[Eyttyrmin Batiiv]] pirate gang, along with over seventy [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], fifty armed [[Yacht/Legends|yachts]], and twenty-seven other [[Corvette/Legends|corvettes]].

The fleet was virtually annihilated at the [[Battle of Khuiumin]] by a pair of [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyers]], the [[Crusader (Victory-class)|''Crusader'']] and ''[[Bombard]]''. The resultant massacre left the ''Backstab'' as the group's only surviving warship, thanks largely due to the tactical ability and discipline of her [[Captain/Legends|captain]], [[Jacob Nive]]. After the battle the remaining Bastiv pirates reformed themselves into the [[Khuiumin Survivors]], led by Nive, dedicating themselves to fighting against [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces and looting Imperial convoys whenever possible.

Some time after the Survivors returned to piracy following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the ''Backstab'', along with the rest of the Survivors, became part of the [[Invids|Invid]] pirate fleet, occasionally using the alias ''Captain's Ladder''. After the collapse of the Invids in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]] the Survivors, now having joined the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and [[Battle of Susevfi|moved]] to [[Susevfi]], continued to utilize the ''Backstab'' as the centerpiece of the formerly Imperial-controlled moon's defense force alongside their [[Clutch (fighter)|Tri-fighters]] and the ''[[Jensaarai/Legends|Jensaari]]''.
